User Story
As an exporter

I need to be able to identify and provide my container number

So that I ensure the number I provide is compliant with EU CATCH system

Acceptance Criteria
Scenario 1 - Shipping container identification field updated

Given I have navigated to /add-transportation-details-container-vessel on my CC manual landing / file upload user journey

When the page loads

Then the field ‘Container identification number' is renamed to ‘Shipping container identification number’

And the hint text underneath 'Shipping container identification number' field is 'Enter the identification number shown on the shipping container. For example, ABCJ0123456'

 

Scenario 2 - Welsh translation

Given I have navigated to /add-transportation-details-container-vessel on my CC manual landing / file upload user journey

When I have selected Welsh language

Then the text is translated to Welsh

English text

Welsh translation

Shipping container identification number

Rhif adnabod cynhwysydd llong

Enter the identification number shown on the shipping container. For example, ABCJ0123456

Rhowch y rhif adnabod a ddangosir ar y cynhwysydd llong. Er enghraifft ABCJ0123456
